title: Rotate 3D-fold timing (L3)
goal: Rotate 14.76 dB. Part of the 12-slug 3D-fold Movements family sharing the Rig/Link swing-out interpolation timing root. Apply/verify the shared Rig/Link fold-timing fix from the Switch lead decode; gate against all 12 family slugs. DoD: measurably up, 0 regressions across the family.
